title: allenai/olmocr
friendlyTitle: A tool for turning PDFs into better AI-ready text
summary: Allen AI's olmocr is a toolkit for turning PDFs into cleaner linearized text suitable for LLM datasets, retrieval systems and training pipelines.
friendlySummary: olmocr helps extract cleaner text from PDF files so AI systems can use the information more reliably.
whyItMatters: It is useful for teams converting messy document collections into model-ready text, especially when PDF structure, ordering and OCR quality matter for downstream retrieval or fine-tuning.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it when you have lots of PDFs and want to build search, RAG or training data from them.
